chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Appeal No.D-112 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.08.2022 Mr. G.M. Laghari advocate for appellant. Mr. Shawak Rathore, DPG. -.-.-. Vide impugned judgment dated 23.11.2020, appellant was convicted and sentenced to suffer rigorous imprisonment for possessing 1027 grams of contraband chars. However, the sentence was suspended and she was handed over to probation officer for one year. Learned counsel for appellant submits that period of one year has passed; therefore, he does not press this appeal on merits having served its purpose. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has no objection to it. Accordingly, this appeal is dismissed in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
